text:
EVANGELION EXTREME is a mini album by Yoko Takahashi. It was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number KICA-2561, it was released on 22 May 2019.
 https://vgmdb.net/album/85229 It is a collection of songs featured in Evangelion Pachinko, alongside a new song. The cover was illustrated by Yoshimichi Kameda.
